underlying_goal: Replace all hardcoded Helvetica font usage in SpriteKit with system sans-serif fonts using semantic/dynamic APIs
friction_detail: First two attempts to use system font names via fontName strings failed because SKLabelNode doesn't resolve private system font tokens, causing serif fallback; required switching to attributedText approach.
brief_summary: User wanted to replace hardcoded Helvetica with system sans-serif fonts in SpriteKit; after two failed approaches Claude discovered SKLabelNode's fontName doesn't support system font tokens and refactored to use attributedText instead.
